form.label: Traffic Analysis
form.description: Deep-dive into Aviatrix Cloud Firewall network traffic

search.query: `aviatrix_l4` | stats count by host | rename host as gateway | sort gateway

`aviatrix_l4` host=$gateway$ proto=$proto$ | eval src_ip=coalesce(src_ip, src) | eval dst_ip=coalesce(dst_ip, dest) | search src_ip=$src$ dst_ip=$dest$ dst_port=$port$ | eval action_type=case(action=="PERMIT", "Allowed", action=="DENY", "Blocked", 1=1, "Other") | where ("$action$"="*" OR action_type="$action$") | eval byte_count=coalesce(tonumber(session_byte_cnt), tonumber(bytes), 0) | timechart sum(byte_count) as bytes by action_type

`aviatrix_l4` host=$gateway$ proto=$proto$ | eval src_ip=coalesce(src_ip, src) | eval dst_ip=coalesce(dst_ip, dest) | search src_ip=$src$ dst_ip=$dest$ dst_port=$port$ | eval action_type=case(action=="PERMIT", "Allowed", action=="DENY", "Blocked", 1=1, "Other") | where ("$action$"="*" OR action_type="$action$") | timechart count by action_type

`aviatrix_l4` host=$gateway$ proto=$proto$ | eval src_ip=coalesce(src_ip, src) | eval dst_ip=coalesce(dst_ip, dest) | search src_ip=$src$ dst_ip=$dest$ dst_port=$port$ | eval action_type=case(action=="PERMIT", "Allowed", action=="DENY", "Blocked", 1=1, "Other") | where ("$action$"="*" OR action_type="$action$") | stats count as Sessions by src_ip, dst_ip, dst_port, proto, action_type | sort - Sessions | head 50 | rename src_ip as "Source", dst_ip as "Destination", dst_port as "Port", proto as "Protocol", action_type as "Action"

`aviatrix_l4` host=$gateway$ proto=$proto$ | eval src_ip=coalesce(src_ip, src) | eval dst_ip=coalesce(dst_ip, dest) | search src_ip=$src$ dst_ip=$dest$ dst_port=$port$ | eval action_type=case(action=="PERMIT", "Allowed", action=="DENY", "Blocked", 1=1, "Other") | where ("$action$"="*" OR action_type="$action$") | eval byte_count=coalesce(tonumber(session_byte_cnt), tonumber(bytes), tonumber(bytes_sent), 0) | stats count as Sessions, sum(byte_count) as Bytes, dc(dst_ip) as "Unique Dests" by src_ip | eval Bytes=round(Bytes/1024/1024, 2) | sort - Sessions | head 20 | rename src_ip as "Source IP", Bytes as "MB Transferred"

`aviatrix_l4` host=$gateway$ proto=$proto$ | eval src_ip=coalesce(src_ip, src) | eval dst_ip=coalesce(dst_ip, dest) | search src_ip=$src$ dst_ip=$dest$ dst_port=$port$ | eval action_type=case(action=="PERMIT", "Allowed", action=="DENY", "Blocked", 1=1, "Other") | where ("$action$"="*" OR action_type="$action$") | eval byte_count=coalesce(tonumber(session_byte_cnt), tonumber(bytes), tonumber(bytes_received), 0) | stats count as Sessions, sum(byte_count) as Bytes, dc(src_ip) as "Unique Sources" by dst_ip | eval Bytes=round(Bytes/1024/1024, 2) | sort - Sessions | head 20 | rename dst_ip as "Destination IP", Bytes as "MB Transferred"

`aviatrix_l4` host=$gateway$ proto=$proto$ | eval src_ip=coalesce(src_ip, src) | eval dst_ip=coalesce(dst_ip, dest) | search src_ip=$src$ dst_ip=$dest$ dst_port=$port$ | eval action_type=case(action=="PERMIT", "Allowed", action=="DENY", "Blocked", 1=1, "Other") | where ("$action$"="*" OR action_type="$action$") | stats count by dst_port | sort - count | head 15

`aviatrix_l4` host=$gateway$ proto=$proto$ | eval src=src_ip, dest=dst_ip, port=dst_port | search src=$src$ dest=$dest$ port=$port$ | eval action_display=action | where ("$action$"="*" OR (action="PERMIT" AND "$action$"="allowed") OR (action="DENY" AND "$action$"="blocked")) | table _time, host, src, dest, port, proto, action_display, session_byte_cnt, uuid | rename host as Gateway, action_display as Action, session_byte_cnt as Bytes, uuid as Policy | head 500

`aviatrix_l7` host=$gateway$ proto=$proto$ | eval src=src, dest=dest, port=dest_port | search src=$src$ dest=$dest$ port=$port$ | eval action_display=action | where ("$action$"="*" OR (action="Permit" AND "$action$"="allowed") OR (action="Deny" AND "$action$"="blocked")) | table _time, host, src, dest, port, proto, action_display, sni_hostname, decided_by | rename host as Gateway, action_display as Action, sni_hostname as Domain, decided_by as Policy | head 500

`aviatrix_fqdn` gateway=$gateway$ | eval src=sip, dest=dip | search src=$src$ dest=$dest$ | eval action_display=if(state="MATCHED", "Allowed", "Blocked") | where ("$action$"="*" OR (state="MATCHED" AND "$action$"="allowed") OR (state!="MATCHED" AND "$action$"="blocked")) | table _time, gateway, src, dest, hostname, rule, action_display | rename gateway as Gateway, action_display as Action, hostname as Domain | head 500
